text.p: The POOR STATE OF ROADS IN THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT AND THE CONSEQUENCES, AND THE SOLUTION

I write this letter with deep - sense of commitment and responsibili-ty, first, to commend your effort for the job well done and secondly to highlight the various difficulties facing the poor road in the State and suggest some lasting solution.

please and please the honourable chairman we want you to help - us to employed people that will repare our road for us because poor road cause acident so - for that We want you to please and look into this problems - Sir.
further more problems of amyrobery on the road they will be trying to bloock the cars and other means of road transport.

This letter will not be comple-te If I fail to utilise it to draw your attention to the three most Important things that my community will want from your administration. first, we want our area to benefit from one of three problems that we are facing now in this State one we have problems of road pro-blems of food problems of water so please we need your asistance 1 character to solve this problems for 1 word us the main things we need is good road construction. These road will ensure that the products of the local cottage Industries and the abundant farm produce get to the buyers and consumers ouside our town fast and cheap too. this dream can only ma-terilize when new road are con-structed and the existing one repaired to make them moto rable all season.
We would like to drop my pen here with the little of mine thank.
